title: omi-fetch: point README at the validated-unmounted extension attempt (it's currently invisible)
prompt: apps/omi-fetch/extension/ holds a real, SDK-validated (zero errors) KyberAgent/KBDE extension attempt — status: validated-unmounted, with an excellent, ranked first-consumer friction report (extension/FRICTION.md). But apps/omi-fetch/README.md never mentions this exists at all; a reader of the main app's README has no way to know an extension attempt is sitting one directory down. This ticket is NOT about mounting it (that's blocked on an external KBDE SDK gap, tracked separately as ledger item D2 — David's own KBDE work, not dark-factory's to fix). It is purely a one-line discoverability fix: add a short section (or one line) to omi-fetch/README.md pointing at extension/ — status, and a pointer to extension/FRICTION.md and docs/extension-notes.md's 'Promotion status' section for anyone who wants the detail.
verify: apps/omi-fetch/README.md contains a clear pointer to extension/ with its validated-unmounted status and a link to FRICTION.md; no code in extension/ is touched.
